name: Apricot Chutney
recipeIngredient: 1 orange, the peel grated and strained
recipeInstructions:
1. Put all of the ingredients into a large pan.
2. Cook gently until the mixture reaches a soft mush consistency, about 1-1/2 hours.
3. Add the walnuts to the mixture.
4. Pack the chutney into sterilized jars.
5. Process the jars in a boiling water bath: pints for 25 minutes; quarts for 30 minutes.
6. Keep the chutney refrigerated for at least one month before using it.
